start_date.description: Start date as YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601 datetime

invoke.script:
tell application "Calendar"
  set newEvent to make new event at end of events of (first calendar) with properties {summary:"{{title}}", description:"{{description}}", start date:(date "{{start_date}}")}
  return "Event created: {{title}}"
end tell

tools.name: calendar_list_today
tools.description: List all events scheduled for today.

invoke.script:
tell application "Calendar"
  set todayEvents to events of (first calendar) whose start date is in (current date)
  set eventList to {}
  repeat with evt in todayEvents
    copy summary of evt to the end of eventList
  end repeat
  return eventList as string
end tell
